parameters.jsCode: function uuidv4(){return "xxxxxxxx-xxxx-4xxx-yxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx".replace(/[xy]/g,c=>{const r=Math.random()*16|0;return(c==="x"?r:(r&0x3|0x8)).toString(16);})}const runId=uuidv4();return[{json:{content_type:"game_highlights",duration:45,run_id:runId}}];

parameters.command: ={{ 'cd /home/node/instagram_stack && python -c "from processors.planner import Planner; import json; p = Planner(); print(json.dumps(p.run()))" | tee /tmp/step0_out.txt && python3 -m pipeline.save_state ' + $json.run_id + ' /tmp/step0_out.txt' }}

={{ 'cd /home/node/instagram_stack && echo ' + JSON.stringify(JSON.stringify({topic: ($json.proposed_topic || ''), type: ($json.proposed_content_type || ''), angle: ($json.proposed_angle || ''), visual_hook: ($json.visual_hook || ''), games: (($json.game_slugs || []).join(', ')), duration: String($json.estimated_duration_seconds || 0) + 's', cost: String($json.estimated_cost_units || 0) + ' units', reasoning: ($json.reasoning || ''), budget: ($json.budget_status || '')})) + ' > /tmp/gate_data.json && python -m pipeline.gate_helper --gate 0 --data-file /tmp/gate_data.json --run-id ' + $json.run_id }}

={{ 'cd /home/node/instagram_stack && python -m pipeline.step2_generate_script --type trending_news --duration 45 --run-id ' + $json.run_id + ' | tee /tmp/step2_out.txt && python3 -m pipeline.save_state ' + $json.run_id + ' /tmp/step2_out.txt' }}

={{ 'cd /home/node/instagram_stack && eval $(python3 -m pipeline.read_state ' + $json.run_id + ') && python -m pipeline.step4_generate_voiceover --script-id $SCRIPT_ID | tee /tmp/step4_out.txt && python3 -m pipeline.save_state ' + $json.run_id + ' /tmp/step4_out.txt' }}

={{ 'cd /home/node/instagram_stack && eval $(python3 -m pipeline.read_state ' + $json.run_id + ') && python -m pipeline.step5_download_footage --script-id $SCRIPT_ID | tee /tmp/step5_out.txt && python3 -m pipeline.save_state ' + $json.run_id + ' /tmp/step5_out.txt' }}

={{ 'cd /home/node/instagram_stack && eval $(python3 -m pipeline.read_state ' + $json.run_id + ') && python -m pipeline.step6_assemble_video --script-id $SCRIPT_ID --voiceover-id $VOICEOVER_ID --footage-id $FOOTAGE_ID | tee /tmp/step6_out.txt && python3 -m pipeline.save_state ' + $json.run_id + ' /tmp/step6_out.txt' }}

={{ 'cd /home/node/instagram_stack && eval $(python3 -m pipeline.read_state ' + $json.run_id + ') && python -m pipeline.step7_publish_reels --video-id $VIDEO_ID --mode publish | tee /tmp/step7_out.txt && python3 -m pipeline.save_state ' + $json.run_id + ' /tmp/step7_out.txt' }}

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { success: true, message: '✅ Instagram pipeline complete.' } }];
